text.tspan: • 允许养宠物的公寓可能

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 更多必备问题 More Questions to Ask:

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

g.text: When is the rent due? 租约什么时候到期？

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

g.text: What floor is it on? 在几楼？

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

g.text: Can you show me the place? 能带我参观一下吗？

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

g.text: Are the neighbors noisy? 邻居吵吗？

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
